name: Sunspire Haven
inside: Tool halls, textile rows, grain brokers, contract tables, and shared storehouses crowd the center while family compounds and worker yards ring the lanes.
interior_patterns: tools is visibly part of daily life.
harvest and unity rites sit beside practical oath-rituals for contracts, storage, and convoy departure
The difference between who belongs, who is tolerated, and who draws scrutiny becomes legible quickly once inside.
